message:
fix(render): Improve emoji width detection and reduce diff row block size

Emoji Width Detection:
- Add `is_probable_emoji()` function to detect emoji codepoints in range
  U+1F000..U+1FAFF that may incorrectly report display width of 1
- When unicode_display_width reports width=1 for a grapheme containing
  a probable emoji, override to width=2 for correct terminal rendering
- Applied consistently in both drawing.rs and frame.rs to ensure all
  rendering paths handle emoji uniformly

Diff Row Block Size:
- Reduce ROW_BLOCK_SIZE from 64 cells (1024 bytes) to 32 cells (512 bytes)
- Smaller blocks provide finer granularity for blockwise skip optimization
  in sparse change scenarios without significant overhead increase
- This allows the diff algorithm to skip unchanged regions more precisely
  when changes are localized to small areas of the screen

Both changes improve rendering correctness and diff performance for
terminal content containing emoji characters and sparse updates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
